title: What we lead with externally.
lede: What we want to put focus on in our marketing assets, and how we want to talk about it.

items.title: What we lead with
items.description: Our opening move — the message that has to land first. Punchy, customer-true, and built to stop the scroll.
talkingPoints: Write the talking points that PMM should hit first when introducing the launch.
Use this space for proof you want everyone to repeat.

items.title: What we reinforce
items.description: The proof that backs the opening — capabilities, customer evidence, and the specifics that make the lead credible.
talkingPoints: List the concrete proof points that reinforce the opening.

items.title: What we close with
items.description: The emotional takeaway — the line we want them carrying out the door.
talkingPoints: What's the lasting impression we want?
What's the line that should echo in every email/ad/social post?
